programmes.show_description: Action with David Carradine. As the Vietnam War comes to an end, one man embarks on a life-threatening mission to free a group of American prisoners held in a secret Vietcong camp. (1986)
Action drama starring Stephen Baldwin. When an asteroid impact on the moon threatens all life on Earth, only one demolition expert can save humankind... (2006)

Crime drama based on true events. A ragtag group of ageing East End criminals plot an audacious, multi-million-pound raid on an underground facility in London. (2017)
